channel.title: Kamel Khimeche on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Kamel Khimeche on LMI

item.title: Isothermal Vapor Pressures of Three Binary Systems: n-Tetradecane plusMethyl Dodecanoate, Methyl Tetradecanoate, or Methyl Hexadecanoatebetween 353.15 and 453.15 K

Experimental vapor pressures (from 1 Pa to 100 kPa) of six saturatedFatty Acid Methyl Esters (FAMEs): Methyl hexanoate, methyl octanoate,methyl decanoate, methyl dodecanoate, methyl tetradecanoate and methylhexadecanoate
